hud_audit.verdict: PASS -- all 8 HUD elements present and correctly styled

white_screen_risk_web_demo.note: T001 white screen issue is Godot engine scenes only, not web-demo. web-demo has proper #0a0a12 fallback background at all times.

groq_loading_ux_gap.finding: After card fade-in (300ms fadeOut), game awaits showCard() which first calls getLLMAdapter() and llm.generateCard() (up to 8s). During this await, the card-overlay is NOT yet shown (showCard() shows it after generation). User sees black fade screen for up to 8 seconds with no feedback.
groq_loading_ux_gap.recommendation: Show card-overlay with 'Merlin consulte les etoiles...' text immediately before LLM call, replace with actual card when ready.

visual_regression_items.description: 8s LLM loading blackout in card overlay

screenshots_check.note: No headless screenshots available. Visual assessment is text/code analysis only.

summary: No visual regressions since cycle 10. All 8 HUD elements present. Loading screen with Celtic knot spinner functional. Minigame and card overlays correctly styled. web-demo has no white-screen risk (dark background #0a0a12 always visible). MEDIUM: 8s LLM generation period shows no UI feedback -- user may perceive freeze.
next_steps: T037: Add LLM loading indicator in card-overlay before generateCard() completes
